hooks.command: [ -n "$TMUX_PANE" ] && tmux set-window-option -t "$TMUX_PANE" @waiting 1 && tmux set-option -w -t "$TMUX_PANE" @wait_since "$(date +%s)" && WNAME=$(tmux display-message -t "$TMUX_PANE" -p '#W') && "$HOME/.tmux/notify.sh" "Claude Code" "Agent $WNAME waiting for input" && echo "$(date +%s) wait $TMUX_PANE" >> "$HOME/.tmux/apm.log"; true
[ -n "$TMUX_PANE" ] && tmux set-window-option -t "$TMUX_PANE" @waiting 0 && tmux set-option -wu -t "$TMUX_PANE" @wait_since && echo "$(date +%s) agent $TMUX_PANE" >> "$HOME/.tmux/apm.log"; true
